mapper.select: SELECT batch_id, medicine_id, batch_number, expiry_date, remaining_quantity, create_time, update_time FROM clinic_stock_batch WHERE medicine_id = #{medicineId} AND remaining_quantity > 0 AND expiry_date >= #{today} ORDER BY expiry_date ASC, batch_id ASC FOR UPDATE

SELECT batch_id, medicine_id, batch_number, expiry_date, remaining_quantity, create_time, update_time FROM clinic_stock_batch WHERE medicine_id = #{medicineId} ORDER BY expiry_date ASC, batch_id ASC FOR UPDATE
SELECT expiry_date FROM clinic_stock_batch WHERE medicine_id = #{medicineId} AND remaining_quantity > 0 ORDER BY expiry_date ASC, batch_id ASC LIMIT 1
SELECT batch_id, medicine_id, batch_number, expiry_date, remaining_quantity, create_time, update_time FROM clinic_stock_batch WHERE medicine_id = #{medicineId} ORDER BY expiry_date ASC, batch_id ASC

SELECT b.batch_id AS batchId, b.medicine_id AS medicineId, m.name AS medicineName, b.batch_number AS batchNumber, b.create_time AS stockInDate, b.expiry_date AS expiryDate, b.remaining_quantity AS remainingQuantity, b.create_time AS createTime, b.update_time AS updateTime FROM clinic_stock_batch b LEFT JOIN clinic_medicine m ON m.medicine_id = b.medicine_id
AND m.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{medicineName}, '%')
AND b.medicine_id = #{medicineId}
ORDER BY b.expiry_date ASC, b.batch_id ASC
